expectations.text: Recommends access_token in memory (not localStorage) for security
expectations.evidence: `access_token` → **memory only** (Zustand store), NOT localStorage — prevents XSS theft
if (error.response?.status === 401 && !original._retry) { ... const { data } = await axios.post('/api/v1/auth/refresh', { refresh_token: refreshToken }); ... return api(original);
The `user.role` field is either `WINEMAKER` or `ADMIN`. Use it to conditionally render admin sections: {user?.role === 'ADMIN' && <AdminPanel />}

expectations.text: References GET /api/v1/auth/me for loading user context
expectations.evidence:
GET /api/v1/auth/me
Authorization: Bearer <access_token> ... const user = await api.get('/auth/me');
